positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic mountain range at sunset. The mountain peaks are sharp, abstract silhouettes, glowing with iridescent neon blues and deep violets, contrasting against a gradient sky of burnt orange, soft lavender, and turquoise. Scattered within the cosmic fog are abstract constellations made of glowing gold dust and small, stylized celestial bodies (like crescent moons and rings). The overall composition must be centered, suitable for apparel printing, emphasizing clean lines and high contrast. Art style: Modern geometric vector art combined with vaporwave aesthetic. Composition: Rule of thirds for the horizon, strong central focus.
negative: text, watermark, logo, trademark, writing, low quality, blurry, artifacts, noise, grain, excess color, poorly rendered anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, messy details
